problem: Psychiatrists and therapists need specialized EHR tools that support e-prescribing, medication management, and psychiatric documentation workflows that general EHR platforms don't adequately address.
solution: EHR software built specifically for psychiatrists, therapists, and clinicians, featuring e-prescribe capabilities with DrFirst integration, PDMP integration, prior authorization support, controlled substance prescribing, and customizable treatment plans for psychiatric and therapeutic care.
